title: Queen Jelly
description: Adds jellyfishing (and the perils that come with it) to your Minecraft world!
body:
Queen Jelly adds jellyfishing to the game, which allows the player to craft new Jams that increase the value of the fruit used to craft them! Jams yield special new effects when consumed! Queen Jelly also adds a new boss by the same name, the Queen Jelly; A royal powerhouse that won't hesitate to throw her jelly subjects at you! Battling with this ruthless queen may yield treasures previously unknown to the world of Minecraft; such as the "Jello Shot" which can fire the Jams you make, applying their effects to your target! 

  While jellyfish will spawn naturally in meadows and other biomes with flowers, the "Gelating" will exclusively spawn during fights with the Queen Jelly. The Gelatings are the Queen Jelly's most elite bodyguards, knocking you back and away from their Queen. When defeated, Gelatings will drop Gelatin which can be used to create Jello! Similar to cake, Jello can be placed as a block. What's unique about Jello is that you can stuff it with whatever food you want, applying the effect of any food item for all 4 bites of the Jello block!
  
  The jellyfish's stings will do damage depending on how conductive your armor is; wear a full set of leather to become immune to the jellies you farm, or wear gold if you want a challenge! You can even mix and match your equipment to find the best cost to reward for you! Use the "Shocking" enchantment to boost your attack damage using the same algorithm, providing a new advantage against the denizens of the Nether!
